templates.name: How do you fix untied tassels on a Turkish towel?
templates.content:
Below is a step-by-step process on how to fix untied tassels/fringes. Tassels are durable but may come untied from time to time. To prevent it from coming completely untied, check it before washing for loose knots, and tighten the knots as needed. Be careful not to wash your towels with items that could pull or snag the fabric. These include clothing with zippers, hooks, or velcro.

Part 1: https://sandcloud.attn.tv/sl/oDDcvgJ9
Part 2: https://sandcloud.attn.tv/sl/5UtlugPL
Part 3: https://sandcloud.attn.tv/sl/bi0TCFIT

templates.name: How do I wash the towels?
templates.content: Machine wash on delicate or gentle, separately. If the towel is tie-dyed, it can bleed in the first few washes. Be sure to wash tie-dyed towels separately, until any excess dye has been removed. Hang to dry or tumble dry on low, and don't use bleach, fabric softeners, or dryer sheets.

templates.name: Opal Waffle Robe Gray sleeve length
templates.content: The sleeve length from arm seam to end of sleeve are as follows: S/M 21.65 inches (55cm) and L/XL 23.65 inches (60cm).

templates.name: How come my towels don’t have the same color?
templates.content: Every tie-dye is hand-dyed and one of a kind with color. Due to the unique nature of the tie-dye process, each product may vary slightly in color and design.

templates.name: Lost or stolen packages
templates.content: I'm sorry to hear this! Please contact the shipping carrier and file a claim for a lost package. Shipping carriers can take up to 21 business days to respond and provide a solution for your missing package. Once you hear back from the carrier, please contact our support team at customerservice@sandcloud.com for further assistance.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 2-3 business days and we usually ship via UPS, USPS, DHL, or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 4-7 business days domestically or 7-10 business days during sales and holidays. International shipping takes 15-21 business days, and during sales/holidays, it may take 18-25 business days.

templates.name: Are your bath towels sand resistant / sand repellent?
templates.content: Our bath towels are single-sided or double-sided terry looped making them non-sand resistant as the sand might get into the loops. We have come up with new bath towels that are sand resistant (Polka Dot bath towels). They're a combination of raised terry and flat weaves and you can check them out here: https://www.sandcloud.com/pages/search?term=polka%20dot

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on domestic orders over $150. Maybe you can add something else to reach the min?

templates.name: Is the party blanket a towel or a blanket?
templates.content:
The beach towels are lightweight towels designed specifically for the beach and pool. Since the beach towels are flat woven, they are all sand resistant. The blankets are a twist on our traditional lightweight Turkish towels. Heavier than our towels, but lighter than a traditional blanket, they are perfect for a picnic or lounging around the house.

As they are woven differently from our beach towels, some of them aren't sand resistant and they also take longer time to dry. Some of the blankets do have the sand resistant property and this feature is clearly mentioned in the product description page of each item. 

The blankets vary in properties and texture, as the weaves used are different from that of the beach towels.

templates.name: Holiday shipping
templates.content: Thanks for reaching out. Orders placed after December 12th are not expected to arrive before Christmas. Due to the Peak Holiday Times, Processing Times are averaging around 5-7 Days for all service levels in addition to transit times. I hope you still decide to order today though!

templates.name: What's the difference between your beach and bath towels?
templates.content: Our towels are made of 100% Turkish Organic Cotton. The Long staple fibers used in it help to make the towels absorb moisture quicker. The lightness of the towels helps them to air dry super quickly. We have the bath towel and beach towel collection. Since the beach towels are flat woven, they're sand resistant. These are designed for beach and pool. Bath towels are single-sided or double-sided terry looped making them non-sand resistant as the sand might get into the loops, however, our single-sided terry looped bath towels are sand resistant on the flat woven side. Our bath towels are thicker due to the terry looping than our beach towels. The looping allows them to absorb more but since the other side is not looped, they'll dry quicker. Since our bath towels are made of Turkish cotton with high moisture absorbency, they're more absorbent than the conventional bath towels that are available in the market.

templates.name: Are your towels Oeko-Tex certified?
templates.content: All our towel dyes used are Oeko-Tex Certified and they're all eco friendly low impact dyes. No harmful chemicals are used in the dyes. OEKO-TEX is one of the world's best-known labels for textiles tested for harmful substances. It stands for customer confidence and high product safety. Also the Organic Cotton yarns we use in our towels are GOTS Certified, but the Finished Towels isn't certified even though it is GOTS Yarn certified.

templates.name: Weight & dimensions of the Crush Turtle Teal
templates.content: The Crush Turtle Teal XL weighs approximately 1.2897 lb. The dimensions are approx 62" x 76" (157.5cm x 193cm).

templates.name: How do I wash the clothes?
templates.content: Hand wash the clothes individually in cold water with detergent for the first few washes. They can be combined with 'like' colors in cold water after a few washes.

templates.name: The VIPDEAL code is not giving me 40% off
templates.content: Please note that not all of our Bath products are 40% off. Only select items are part of this promotion and others have lower discounts, so when you apply the code VIPDEAL on the already discounted items, you will receive up to 40% off. I apologize for any confusion and please let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.

templates.content: The blankets can fit a full-size bed. Blankets will fit the top of the bed but won't hang from the sides, depending on size.

templates.content: There is no difference in the benefits of the material between the Terra and Classic bath towels. The pattern is the only distinction between the two. Both towels absorb moisture quickly.
